summary: Iteration 51 - All 3 user-reported bug fixes VERIFIED. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified - IST time format, match sorting, questions loading, My Contests redesign.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix 1 (Live ticker IST): cricket.py lines 72-110 correctly converts GMT to IST using IST_OFFSET timedelta
Bug Fix 2 (Match card IST): matches.py lines 195-208 adds start_time_ist field with proper IST formatting
Bug Fix 3 (Smart sorting): matches.py lines 164-186 implements live first, then nearest upcoming (asc), then recent completed (desc)
Bug Fix 4 (Questions timezone): contests.py lines 315-318 and 352-355 fix timezone-naive datetime comparison by adding timezone.utc
Bug Fix 5 (My Contests redesign): MyContestsPage.jsx complete redesign with stats strip, filter pills, team logos, status badges
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 verified all 3 user-reported bug fixes: (1) Contest page redesigned with stats strip, filter pills, team logos - MyContestsPage.jsx completely rewritten, (2) Questions loading correctly - timezone fix in contests.py for lock_time comparison using timezone.utc, (3) Matches sorted correctly with IST time - smart sorting in matches.py (live first, upcoming asc, completed desc) and IST formatting. Key test data: LSG vs DC contest ID: 53fe3a89-428c-4465-a613-ac8ca2661c0c, KKR vs DC contest ID: 2db7cefe-e107-4a93-80a6-6a30104b2ccc. Live ticker shows IST times like '06 Apr, 07:30 PM IST'. Match cards show dates like '31 Mar 2026, 07:30 PM IST'.

bug_1_live_ticker_ist.verification: GET /api/cricket/live-ticker returns ist_display field with IST format, status text converted from GMT to IST

bug_2_match_card_ist.verification: GET /api/matches returns start_time_ist field with format '06 Apr 2026, 07:30 PM IST'

bug_3_match_sorting.verification: Matches sorted: live first, upcoming ascending (nearest first), completed descending (most recent first)

bug_4_questions_loading.verification: GET /api/contests/{id}/questions returns 16 questions with Hindi text, timezone fix prevents TypeError

bug_5_my_contests_redesign.verification: My Contests page has stats strip (Joined/Correct/Points), filter pills, team logos, status badges
